---
title: "Brain Simulation Workshop"
author:
  - "Leon Stefanovski"
  - "Marius Pille"
  - "Leon Martin"
date: 2026-05-12
toc: false
page-layout: full
body-class: workshop-home-page
format: html
---

::: {.workshop-home}
::: {.workshop-hero aria-labelledby="workshop-hero-title"}
<iframe class="workshop-hero__visual-frame" src="brain-network-background.html" title="Animated brain network visualization" aria-hidden="true" tabindex="-1"></iframe>

::: {.workshop-hero__texture aria-hidden="true"}
:::

::: {.workshop-hero__content}
::: {.workshop-kicker}
FAIR Brain Data Science Bootcamp | Track 4
:::

# Mechanistic Whole-Brain Simulation Workshop {#workshop-hero-title}

::: {.workshop-hero__lead}
Personalized brain network modeling with The Virtual Brain, ontology-driven model specification, and gradient-based optimization.
:::

::: {.workshop-hero__meta aria-label="Workshop details"}
[12-13 May 2026]{.workshop-hero__pill}
[Charité University Medicine Berlin]{.workshop-hero__pill}
[Berlin Institute of Health]{.workshop-hero__pill}
:::

::: {.workshop-actions}
[Start Setup](setup.qmd){.workshop-action .workshop-action--primary}
[Open Slides](slides.qmd){.workshop-action}
[View Agenda](agenda/agenda.qmd){.workshop-action}
:::
:::
:::
:::

::: {.home-section .home-overview}
::: {.home-copy}
## About

Track 4 workshop of the **FAIR Brain Data Science Bootcamp**, 12-13 May 2026,
Charité University Medicine Berlin and Berlin Institute of Health.

In this workshop, participants learn core concepts and methods for personalized
whole-brain network modeling using The Virtual Brain (TVB). The workflow combines
individualized model definition, simulation, and analysis with ontology-driven
model specification ([TVB-O](https://virtual-twin.github.io/tvbo)) and
gradient-based optimization tooling
([TVB-Optim](https://virtual-twin.github.io/tvboptim)) [@Martin2025; @Pille2025].
:::

::: {.home-signal-list}
::: {.home-signal}
**Network structure**

Brain regions, tractography, surface geometry, and anatomical constraints.
:::

::: {.home-signal}
**Model dynamics**

Neural mass equations, coupling functions, integration, and observations.
:::

::: {.home-signal}
**Optimization loop**

Simulation targets, differentiable workflows, and parameter fitting.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Getting Started

The Python environment is managed with [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/):

```bash
pip install uv
```

Tools used:

```bash
uv pip install tvb
uv pip install tvbo
uv pip install tvboptim
```

The full source code lives at
<https://github.com/virtual-twin/Brain-Simulation-Workshop>.
:::

::: {.home-pathways}
::: {.home-pathway}
::: {.home-pathway__number}
01
:::

### [Agenda](agenda/agenda.qmd)

Two-day program with sessions, breaks, and references.
:::

::: {.home-pathway}
::: {.home-pathway__number}
02
:::

### [Slides](slides.qmd)

RevealJS workshop slides used in the live sessions.
:::

::: {.home-pathway}
::: {.home-pathway__number}
03
:::

### [Notebooks](notebooks/02a_mean_field_models.qmd)

Hands-on Jupyter notebooks for each session.
:::
:::

::: {.home-references}
## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
:::
